testcase.name: StateIndex ordering regressions > preserves the newest put when an older record is replayed later
StateIndex ordering regressions > does not let an older tombstone override a newer live value
StateIndex ordering regressions > keeps the newest tombstone timestamp when an older tombstone arrives later
Regression: codec selection stability > produces deterministic telemetry codec sequence for same input
Regression: EOS Missing > should throw IncompleteDataError if EOS marker is missing
Regression: EOS Trailing Bytes > should throw if bytes exist after EOS
Regression: float precision stability > keeps IEEE-754 semantics for challenging floating values
Regression: Integrity Mismatch > should roundtrip bit-exact with seed 12345
Regression: quarantine trigger stability > keeps triggering quarantine on noisy bursts and remains decodable
Regression: Truncation Silent Success > should throw IncompleteDataError for truncated streams
